summary: Iteration 55: Tested Import Costing, Sales/Purchase Register Edit, and GST Planning features. Fixed critical bug in ImportCosting.jsx where API URLs were missing /api prefix. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend features verified working.

fixed_issues.issue: API URLs missing /api prefix causing 'Failed to load data' error
fixed_issues.fix: Added /api prefix to all import-shipments endpoints (lines 103, 380, 390, 408, 422, 449)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 55 are working: 1) Import Costing page loads shipments correctly after API URL fix, 2) Sales Register shows Edit buttons for admin with working dialog, 3) Purchase Register shows Edit buttons for admin with working dialog, 4) GST Planning shows Output GST, Input GST with CGST/SGST/IGST breakdown, Net GST Payable correctly calculated

import_costing.details: Page loads 5 shipments, shows Total Landed Cost, GST Claimable, Edit buttons visible

sales_register_edit.details: Admin sees orange Edit (pencil) buttons, clicking opens dialog with editable fields (HSN, Qty, Rate, GST%, Discount)

purchase_register_edit.details: Admin sees orange Edit (pencil) buttons (14 found), clicking opens dialog with editable fields

gst_planning.details: Selecting Electronics Bay firm shows Output GST (₹522 with CGST: ₹261, SGST: ₹261, IGST: ₹0), Input GST (₹61,611), ITC Balance (₹10,000), Net GST Payable (₹0)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Import Costing page showing 'Failed to load data' and 'No import shipments found' despite API returning 5 shipments
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: API URLs were missing /api prefix. Code was using ${API}/import-shipments instead of ${API}/api/import-shipments
bug_fix_applied.fix_applied: Added /api prefix to all 6 import-shipments API calls
